spec.name: Soul Sense Field
spec.summary: Detects soul reactive flux as a field volume at long reach, targeting a prepared surface with immediate discharge with active regulation while it runs.

A pentagon sense/control recipe that channels soul discipline into reactive output. It applies a field pattern against surface across long reach with immediate persistence.
